# SkillForge

SkillForge is a catalog of reusable Codex skills.

## Skills
- [Codebase To Agentic Skills](skills/codebase-to-agentic-skills/index.html): Turn a source repository or local codebase into a reviewable set of candidate SkillForge agentic skills using source-context maps, candidate tables, Skill Design Cards, adapter plans, and publication evidence.
- [Get YouTube Media](skills/get-youtube-media/index.html): Search YouTube, retrieve transcripts and captions, inspect caption languages, and download authorized media for research workflows.
- [Hugging Face Dataset Viewer](skills/huggingface-datasets/index.html): Inspect Hugging Face datasets with read-only Dataset Viewer API calls for splits, rows, search, filters, parquet URLs, sizes, and statistics.
- [NV-Generate-CTMR](skills/nv-generate-ctmr/index.html): Plan and guide research synthetic CT and MRI generation workflows with NVIDIA-Medtech NV-Generate-CTMR, MAISI models, model variants, config previews, and guarded execution.
- [NV-Segment-CTMR](skills/nv-segment-ctmr/index.html): Plan and guide research CT/MRI segmentation workflows with NV-Segment-CTMR, MONAI bundle commands, label prompts, and provenance.
- [Project Retrospective](skills/project-retrospective/index.html): Create durable project retrospectives and interaction logs that preserve user asks, Codex interpretations, work performed, findings, responses, and lessons learned.
- [Radiological Report to ROI](skills/radiological-report-to-roi/index.html): Generate research ROI masks and summaries from a radiology report, image volume, segmentation mask, and selected anatomy labels.
- [Skill Discovery Evaluation](skills/skill-discovery-evaluation/index.html): Improve SkillForge skill discoverability for humans, agents, local search, generated catalog pages, and publication review.
- [SkillForge](skills/skillforge/index.html): Use SkillForge to find, inspect, install, share, update, evaluate, and manage reusable Codex skills.
